productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Red Polo TShirt
description: Red polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a grey ribbed collar with red tipping, short sleeves with grey ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, the number 5 appliquéd on the left sleeve, “Italia” in raised rubber at the back, branding appliquéd on the left chest and a vented hem
